connection_id.description: Direct Postgres connection ID to configure.

default_timeout_ms.description: Default statement timeout in milliseconds when a request does not provide timeout_ms.

enabled.description: Whether tenant-scoped querying is enabled for this connection.

max_result_limit.description: Maximum result row limit. Explicit query limits above this value are clamped.

max_timeout_ms.description: Maximum allowed statement timeout in milliseconds.

tenant_column_name.description: Column name that must exist on every enabled table and will be enforced as the tenant key.

tenant_column_names_by_table.description: Optional per-table tenant column overrides keyed by direct Postgres table name. Each override must have the same inferred tenant type as the global tenant column.
